step_rationale: Monocyte/macrophage activation marker; inflammatory subset in plaque destabilization.
mechanism: CD14 marks monocyte and macrophage subsets that drive vascular inflammation, plaque destabilization, and contribute to platelet–leukocyte crosstalk during acute coronary thrombosis.
